summary: David, what a fantastic week—you're down 3.6 lbs over the past two weeks and closing in on 45 lbs lost from your starting point. Your consistency is really shining through with 14 days logged and a solid 1.8 lbs per week loss rate, plus you're averaging over 10,000 steps daily and getting 7.3 hours of sleep, which is exactly what your body needs right now. One thing I'd like you to focus on next week is your body battery—it's sitting at 28, which suggests you might be pushing a bit hard without enough recovery time. Try adding one extra rest day or an easier movement day to help recharge. You're doing the work, and it's paying off in real, sustainable results.
